title: Grammys 2026: 10 takeaways from a historic, chaotic night
text: NPR provides 10 key takeaways from the 2026 Grammy Awards ceremony. Key takeaway regarding Best Rap Album: Kendrick Lamar's win for GNX was part of his historic night where he became the most-awarded rapper in Grammy history, surpassing Jay-Z. His five wins included Best Rap Album, Best Rap Song, Best Melodic Rap Performance, Best Rap Performance, and Record of the Year. Clipse's historic win for Chains & Whips represented their first Grammy ever after nearly 50 years in the music industry, finally getting recognition from the Recording Academy. The diversity of nominees in Best Rap Album reflected hip-hop's continued expansion and critical acceptance within the Grammy Awards. Bad Bunny's Album of the Year win for a non-English language album marked another historic moment at the ceremony. Overall, the 2026 Grammys featured multiple historic achievements and moments that will be remembered in Grammy history.
